title: 5 ‘Strong Buy' Stocks With Dividend Hikes Expected This Week
text: After years of a low interest rate environment, many investors have turned to equities, not only for the growth potential but also for solid and dependable dividends that help to provide an income stream.

title: Alphabet And 4 Other Stocks Sold By Insiders
text: Nasdaq futures traded sharply lower this morning after Meta Platforms, Inc. (NASDAQ: FB) reported worse-than-expected Q4 EPS results and issued weak forecast. When insiders sell shares, it indicates their concern in the company's prospects or that they view the stock as being overpriced.
